title: Monday.com plans 20% layoffs citing an 'AI-driven growth strategy.' Read the co-CEO's memo to employees.
excerpt: Monday.com's co-CEO Eran Zinman wrote that the layoffs decision "was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI."
content_html:
By Henry Chandonnet

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Big cuts are coming for Monday.com.

The enterprise software company plans to cut 20% of its workforce, according to a Form 6-K it filed. The layoffs are meant to align the company with its "strategic focus on the AI Work Platform," the disclosure said.

Monday.com joins the growing group of companies citing AI while announcing layoffs, like Snap and Block. Monday.com said that it was pursuing an "AI-driven growth strategy."

"We entered a new era where AI is transforming the role of software, creating the greatest opportunity our industry has ever seen," Monday.com cofounder and co-CEO Eran Zinman said in a message to employees, which he published to LinkedIn. "We have a new market to capture. Without a fundamental change in how we operate, we will not be able to compete and win that market."

The changes mean Monday.com is becoming flatter with more autonomous teams, Zinman wrote.

As to whether the layoffs were driven by AI improvements, the co-CEO wrote that the decision "was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI."

While Monday.com plans to cut 20% of its workforce, it also said it plans to continue hiring in areas of focus.

It's not immediately clear exactly how many workers will be affected. In its 2025 annual report, Monday.com said that it had 3,155 employees. Monday.com did not immediately respond to a request for comment from Business Insider.

The company's stock rose throughout the morning, though it has since ticked back down. The stock has slumped roughly 75% in the last year.

Monday.com provides project management software to enterprises. This category is the target of growing "SaaSpocalypse" worries. Investors and analysts fret that AI and vibe coding could weaken companies' reliance on these tools.

Read the Monday.com co-CEO's full memo:

Hi everyone,
Over the past nine months, we have shifted our core vision moving from managing work to doing the work for our customers, with people and AI agents working together in one workspace.
This has required us to change our product, our strategy, and how we serve our customers.
But it became clear that changing our strategy and product is not enough. The organization we built for our previous chapter is not the organization that fits the new AI era.
Today, we are announcing the very difficult decision to reduce our global workforce by ~20%, affecting around 620 people.
This is the most painful decision we have made since founding monday.com - yet we are certain it is the right one. We made it. We own it. And we take full responsibility for it.
The people leaving are talented colleagues and friends. They helped build this company, support our customers, and create a culture we are deeply proud of. We are incredibly grateful to them, and we know that nothing we say can lessen the impact this will have on them and their families.
We are not making this change to protect what we have. We are making it to go all in on what monday.com can become.

Why are we making this change?

We entered a new era where AI is transforming the role of software, creating the greatest opportunity our industry has ever seen.
We have a new market to capture. Without a fundamental change in how we operate, we will not be able to compete and win that market.
To fully realize this opportunity, and ensure monday.com is positioned to lead in this landscape, we need to move faster, execute more decisively, take on new challenges, respond quickly to market changes, and empower people in the company to create greater impact. Some of the things we are changing in monday:
  1. A flatter organization - We are reducing management layers, creating more empowered teams, and enabling faster decision-making.
  2. More autonomous teams - We are moving from teams with many dependencies to smaller groups with broader ownership and greater authority to execute.
  3. A new go-to-market model - Our new offering is opening a new market, and that market requires us to work differently. New and existing customers increasingly expect deeper implementation support as they adopt AI. We will work more closely with customers, increase our on-site presence, create new roles, and adapt many existing ones.
Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision. We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our people, our products, AI, and future growth.

For the people leaving monday.com

Thank you. Thank you for all your hard work, for the significant impact you have made, for caring so deeply about monday.com, and for always being willing to help and lend a hand. We know this is part of our culture, and it is something we consistently hear from everyone who interacts with people at monday.com.
We want to be very clear: this decision is not a reflection of your performance, your contribution, or your value. It is the result of a management decision about how to structure the company for its next chapter.
We are committed to supporting you through this transition with care, respect, and meaningful assistance. We will do everything we reasonably can to help you find your next opportunity, and we will provide you with a generous support package.
To companies that are hiring: we recommend these people wholeheartedly. They are exceptional professionals and teammates, and we will help connect them with organizations looking for outstanding talent.

For the people staying

It is not easy to be part of such a significant change or to see colleagues and friends leave so quickly. We understand how difficult this will be. We also owe you clarity about what this change means.
The change is not about asking fewer people to do the same amount of work. We are making real choices about what we will stop doing. We will simplify how we work, remove unnecessary friction, and give teams more authority to make decisions.
The company that comes out of this change will have clearer priorities, fewer layers, faster decisions, and greater ownership.

We are deeply confident about our future

Our path is very clear to us. This is a change we have chosen to make, and we are taking full responsibility for it. We have never seen such a significant opportunity in software, driven by such exciting technology.
Nothing gives us more confidence than seeing how new and existing customers are responding to our new offering, and seeing adoption of our AI products accelerate.
Every week, we see more evidence that our strategy is the right one. Customers are embracing our new vision, adoption of our AI capabilities continues to accelerate, and our confidence continues to grow.
Our momentum is strong, and we believe we are on the right path to success on a massive market opportunity.
To ease the uncertainty around this we will send all employees an email message within the next hour, followed by a personal call from one of your managers.
For all managers - we know how difficult it is to process this personally, even as you continue to lead your teams. We have every confidence in your leadership and know you'll approach these conversations with the care, clarity, and respect that define our culture. Thank you for being there for your people during this transition.
Thank you,
Roy & Eran
During the change process, we received a few questions we'd like to clarify:
  • Is the reason we are doing this reduction is to improve margins? No. Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision. We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our talent, our products, AI, and future growth.
  • Do we plan more reductions in the future? We designed this change to create the organization we believe we need for our next chapter. We are not planning any further workforce reductions.
  • Is this reduction driven by AI improvements? No. While we are seeing significant value from AI internally, this decision was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI. We see internal AI adoption as an accelerator of our growth. This change was made to adapt the company to our new vision.
  • Are people expected to work harder now that we have less people? Not harder - better. To give one example, we had many situations where work that could have been done in a few days took many months with multiple meetings and endless friction. This wasn't people's fault and everyone was frustrated by this. Our new org changes ownership to allow people to make decisions and move fast.
  • You're talking about the new AI products, what about our existing market and customers? We are lucky to have amazing customers that love our product and actually use these words to describe it. We need to be there for them with our new vision of doing the work with AI and not just managing it. They are also undergoing change and we will invest heavily to help them - they are our biggest asset.

Read next

Henry Chandonnet

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

  • Software

sentences.en: Hi everyone,Over the past nine months, we have shifted our core vision moving from managing work to doing the work for our customers, with people and AI agents working together in one workspace.This has required us to change our product, our strategy, and how we serve our customers.But it became clear that changing our strategy and product is not enough.
sentences.zh: 大家好，在过去的九个月里，我们已经将我们的核心愿景从管理工作转向为客户工作，让人们和人工智能代理在一个工作空间中一起工作。这要求我们改变我们的产品、我们的战略以及我们为客户服务的方式。但很明显，改变我们的战略和产品是不够的。

sentences.en: The organization we built for our previous chapter is not the organization that fits the new AI era.Today, we are announcing the very difficult decision to reduce our global workforce by ~20%, affecting around 620 people.This is the most painful decision we have made since founding monday.com - yet we are certain it is the right one.
sentences.zh: 我们为上一章建立的组织并不是适合新人工智能时代的组织。今天，我们宣布一项非常艰难的决定，将全球劳动力减少约 20%，影响约 620 人。这是我们自成立 monday.com 以来做出的最痛苦的决定 - 但我们确信这是正确的决定。

sentences.en: We made it.
sentences.zh: 我们做到了。

sentences.en: We own it.
sentences.zh: 我们拥有它。

sentences.en: And we take full responsibility for it.The people leaving are talented colleagues and friends.
sentences.zh: 我们对此承担全部责任。离开的人是才华横溢的同事和朋友。

sentences.en: They helped build this company, support our customers, and create a culture we are deeply proud of.
sentences.zh: 他们帮助建立了这家公司，为我们的客户提供支持，并创造了一种让我们深感自豪的文化。

sentences.en: We are incredibly grateful to them, and we know that nothing we say can lessen the impact this will have on them and their families.We are not making this change to protect what we have.
sentences.zh: 我们非常感谢他们，我们知道我们所说的任何话都无法减轻这对他们及其家人的影响。我们做出这一改变并不是为了保护我们所拥有的。

sentences.en: We are making it to go all in on what monday.com can become.Why are we making this change?We entered a new era where AI is transforming the role of software, creating the greatest opportunity our industry has ever seen.We have a new market to capture.
sentences.zh: 我们正在全力以赴地实现 monday.com 的目标。我们为什么要做出这一改变？我们进入了一个新时代，人工智能正在改变软件的角色，创造了我们行业有史以来最伟大的机会。我们有一个新的市场需要占领。

sentences.en: Without a fundamental change in how we operate, we will not be able to compete and win that market.To fully realize this opportunity, and ensure monday.com is positioned to lead in this landscape, we need to move faster, execute more decisively, take on new challenges, respond quickly to market changes, and empower people in the company to create greater impact.
sentences.zh: 如果我们的运营方式不发生根本性的改变，我们将无法竞争并赢得这个市场。为了充分抓住这个机会，并确保 monday.com 在这一领域处于领先地位，我们需要更快地行动，更果断地执行，接受新的挑战，快速响应市场变化，并赋予公司员工创造更大的影响力。

sentences.en: Some of the things we are changing in monday:A flatter organization - We are reducing management layers, creating more empowered teams, and enabling faster decision-making.More autonomous teams - We are moving from teams with many dependencies to smaller groups with broader ownership and greater authority to execute.A new go-to-market model - Our new offering is opening a new market, and that market requires us to work differently.
sentences.zh: 周一我们将改变的一些事情：更扁平的组织——我们正在减少管理层，创建更强大的团队，并实现更快的决策。更自主的团队——我们正在从具有更多依赖性的团队转向拥有更广泛所有权和更大执行权力的更小团体。新的市场模式——我们的新产品正在打开一个新市场，而这个市场要求我们以不同的方式工作。

sentences.en: New and existing customers increasingly expect deeper implementation support as they adopt AI.
sentences.zh: 随着新客户和现有客户采用人工智能，他们越来越期望获得更深入的实施支持。

sentences.en: We will work more closely with customers, increase our on-site presence, create new roles, and adapt many existing ones.Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision.
sentences.zh: 我们将与客户更密切地合作，增加我们的现场存在，创造新的角色，并调整许多现有的角色。提高利润并不是这个决定的目的。

sentences.en: We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our people, our products, AI, and future growth.For the people leaving monday.comThank you.
sentences.zh: 我们打算将绝大多数储蓄再投资于我们的员工、我们的产品、人工智能和未来的增长。对于离开 monday.com 的人们，谢谢。

sentences.en: Thank you for all your hard work, for the significant impact you have made, for caring so deeply about monday.com, and for always being willing to help and lend a hand.
sentences.zh: 感谢您的辛勤工作，感谢您所产生的重大影响，感谢您对 monday.com 的如此深切的关心，感谢您始终愿意提供帮助和伸出援手。

sentences.en: We know this is part of our culture, and it is something we consistently hear from everyone who interacts with people at monday.com.We want to be very clear: this decision is not a reflection of your performance, your contribution, or your value.
sentences.zh: 我们知道这是我们文化的一部分，也是我们从每个在 monday.com 上与人们互动的人那里听到的。我们要明确的是：这一决定并不反映您的表现、贡献或价值。

sentences.en: It is the result of a management decision about how to structure the company for its next chapter.We are committed to supporting you through this transition with care, respect, and meaningful assistance.
sentences.zh: 这是管理层关于如何构建公司以迎接新篇章的决策的结果。我们致力于以关怀、尊重和有意义的帮助来支持您完成这一过渡。

sentences.en: We will do everything we reasonably can to help you find your next opportunity, and we will provide you with a generous support package.To companies that are hiring: we recommend these people wholeheartedly.
sentences.zh: 我们将尽我们所能帮助您找到下一个机会，我们将为您提供慷慨的支持方案。对于正在招聘的公司：我们全心全意地推荐这些人。

sentences.en: They are exceptional professionals and teammates, and we will help connect them with organizations looking for outstanding talent.For the people stayingIt is not easy to be part of such a significant change or to see colleagues and friends leave so quickly.
sentences.zh: 他们是杰出的专业人士和队友，我们将帮助他们与寻找杰出人才的组织建立联系。对于留下来的人来说，参与如此重大的变革或看到同事和朋友如此迅速地离开并不容易。

sentences.en: We understand how difficult this will be.
sentences.zh: 我们了解这将是多么困难。

sentences.en: We also owe you clarity about what this change means.The change is not about asking fewer people to do the same amount of work.
sentences.zh: 我们还应该让您清楚地了解这一变化的含义。这一变化并不是要求更少的人做同样数量的工作。

sentences.en: We are making real choices about what we will stop doing.
sentences.zh: 我们正在对我们将停止做的事情做出真正的选择。

sentences.en: We will simplify how we work, remove unnecessary friction, and give teams more authority to make decisions.The company that comes out of this change will have clearer priorities, fewer layers, faster decisions, and greater ownership.We are deeply confident about our futureOur path is very clear to us.
sentences.zh: 我们将简化工作方式，消除不必要的摩擦，并赋予团队更多的决策权。从这次变革中走出来的公司将拥有更清晰的优先事项、更少的层级、更快的决策和更大的主人翁意识。我们对我们的未来充满信心，我们的道路也非常清晰。

sentences.en: This is a change we have chosen to make, and we are taking full responsibility for it.
sentences.zh: 这是我们选择做出的改变，我们对此承担全部责任。

sentences.en: We have never seen such a significant opportunity in software, driven by such exciting technology.Nothing gives us more confidence than seeing how new and existing customers are responding to our new offering, and seeing adoption of our AI products accelerate.Every week, we see more evidence that our strategy is the right one.
sentences.zh: 在如此令人兴奋的技术的推动下，我们从未在软件领域看到过如此重要的机会。没有什么比看到新客户和现有客户对我们的新产品的反应以及我们的人工智能产品的采用加速更让我们更有信心了。每周，我们都会看到更多证据表明我们的战略是正确的。

sentences.en: Customers are embracing our new vision, adoption of our AI capabilities continues to accelerate, and our confidence continues to grow.Our momentum is strong, and we believe we are on the right path to success on a massive market opportunity.To ease the uncertainty around this we will send all employees an email message within the next hour, followed by a personal call from one of your managers.For all managers - we know how difficult it is to process this personally, even as you continue to lead your teams.
sentences.zh: 客户正在接受我们的新愿景，我们的人工智能功能的采用不断加速，我们的信心不断增强。我们的势头强劲，我们相信我们正走在在巨大的市场机会上取得成功的正确道路上。为了缓解与此相关的不确定性，我们将在接下来的一小时内向所有员工发送一封电子邮件，然后由您的一位经理打来个人电话。对于所有经理来说，我们知道亲自处理这个问题有多么困难，即使您继续领导您的团队。

sentences.en: We have every confidence in your leadership and know you'll approach these conversations with the care, clarity, and respect that define our culture.
sentences.zh: 我们对您的领导能力充满信心，并且知道您会以谨慎、清晰和尊重的方式进行这些对话，这正是我们的文化。

sentences.en: Thank you for being there for your people during this transition.Thank you,Roy & EranDuring the change process, we received a few questions we'd like to clarify:Is the reason we are doing this reduction is to improve margins?
sentences.zh: 感谢您在过渡期间为您的员工提供支持。谢谢 Roy 和 Eran 在变更过程中，我们收到了一些想要澄清的问题：我们进行此次削减的原因是为了提高利润率吗？

sentences.en: No. Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision.
sentences.zh: 不。提高利润并不是该决定的目的。

sentences.en: We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our talent, our products, AI, and future growth.Do we plan more reductions in the future?
sentences.zh: 我们打算将绝大多数节省下来的资金再投资于我们的人才、产品、人工智能和未来的增长。我们未来是否计划进一步削减开支？

sentences.en: We designed this change to create the organization we believe we need for our next chapter.
sentences.zh: 我们设计这一变革是为了创建我们认为下一章所需的组织。

sentences.en: We are not planning any further workforce reductions.Is this reduction driven by AI improvements?
sentences.zh: 我们不打算进一步裁员。这种裁员是由人工智能改进推动的吗？

sentences.en: No. While we are seeing significant value from AI internally, this decision was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI.
sentences.zh: 不会。虽然我们在内部看到人工智能的巨大价值，但做出这一决定并不是为了降低成本或用人工智能取代人类。

sentences.en: We see internal AI adoption as an accelerator of our growth.
sentences.zh: 我们将内部人工智能的采用视为我们发展的加速器。

sentences.en: This change was made to adapt the company to our new vision.Are people expected to work harder now that we have less people?
sentences.zh: 做出这一改变是为了让公司适应我们的新愿景。现在我们的员工减少了，人们是否会更加努力地工作？

sentences.en: Not harder - better.
sentences.zh: 不是更难——更好。

sentences.en: To give one example, we had many situations where work that could have been done in a few days took many months with multiple meetings and endless friction.
sentences.zh: 举个例子，我们遇到过很多情况，本来可以在几天内完成的工作却花了好几个月的时间，而且还需要多次会议和无休止的摩擦。

sentences.en: This wasn't people's fault and everyone was frustrated by this.
sentences.zh: 这不是人们的错，每个人都对此感到沮丧。

sentences.en: Our new org changes ownership to allow people to make decisions and move fast.You're talking about the new AI products, what about our existing market and customers?
sentences.zh: 我们的新组织改变了所有权，让人们能够做出决策并快速行动。你谈论的是新的人工智能产品，那么我们现有的市场和客户呢？

sentences.en: We are lucky to have amazing customers that love our product and actually use these words to describe it.
sentences.zh: 我们很幸运，拥有热爱我们产品并实际使用这些词来描述它的出色客户。

sentences.en: We need to be there for them with our new vision of doing the work with AI and not just managing it.
sentences.zh: 我们需要以新的愿景为他们提供帮助，即利用人工智能开展工作，而不仅仅是管理人工智能。

sentences.en: They are also undergoing change and we will invest heavily to help them - they are our biggest asset.
sentences.zh: 他们也在经历变革，我们将大力投资来帮助他们——他们是我们最大的资产。

blocks.html_en: Why are we making this change?

sentences.en: Why are we making this change?
sentences.zh: 我们为什么要做出这样的改变？

blocks.html_en: • A flatter organization - We are reducing management layers, creating more empowered teams, and enabling faster decision-making.

sentences.en: A flatter organization - We are reducing management layers, creating more empowered teams, and enabling faster decision-making.
sentences.zh: 更扁平的组织——我们正在减少管理层，创建更强大的团队，并加快决策速度。

blocks.html_en: • More autonomous teams - We are moving from teams with many dependencies to smaller groups with broader ownership and greater authority to execute.

sentences.en: More autonomous teams - We are moving from teams with many dependencies to smaller groups with broader ownership and greater authority to execute.
sentences.zh: 更自主的团队——我们正在从具有许多依赖性的团队转向拥有更广泛所有权和更大执行权力的较小团队。

blocks.html_en: • A new go-to-market model - Our new offering is opening a new market, and that market requires us to work differently. New and existing customers increasingly expect deeper implementation support as they adopt AI. We will work more closely with customers, increase our on-site presence, create new roles, and adapt many existing ones.

sentences.en: A new go-to-market model - Our new offering is opening a new market, and that market requires us to work differently.
sentences.zh: 新的市场进入模式——我们的新产品正在打开一个新市场，而这个市场要求我们以不同的方式工作。

sentences.en: New and existing customers increasingly expect deeper implementation support as they adopt AI.
sentences.zh: 随着新客户和现有客户采用人工智能，他们越来越期望获得更深入的实施支持。

sentences.en: We will work more closely with customers, increase our on-site presence, create new roles, and adapt many existing ones.
sentences.zh: 我们将与客户更加密切地合作，增加我们的现场影响力，创造新的角色，并调整许多现有的角色。

blocks.html_en: For the people leaving monday.com

sentences.en: For the people leaving monday.com
sentences.zh: 对于离开 Monday.com 的人们

blocks.html_en: For the people staying

sentences.en: For the people staying
sentences.zh: 对于入住的人来说

blocks.html_en: We are deeply confident about our future

sentences.en: We are deeply confident about our future
sentences.zh: 我们对未来充满信心

blocks.html_en: • Is the reason we are doing this reduction is to improve margins? No. Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision. We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our talent, our products, AI, and future growth.

sentences.en: Is the reason we are doing this reduction is to improve margins?
sentences.zh: 我们进行此次削减的原因是为了提高利润率吗？

sentences.en: No. Improving margins was not the purpose of this decision.
sentences.zh: 不。提高利润并不是该决定的目的。

sentences.en: We intend to reinvest the vast majority of the savings in our talent, our products, AI, and future growth.
sentences.zh: 我们打算将绝大多数节省的资金重新投资于我们的人才、产品、人工智能和未来增长。

blocks.html_en: • Do we plan more reductions in the future? We designed this change to create the organization we believe we need for our next chapter. We are not planning any further workforce reductions.

sentences.en: Do we plan more reductions in the future?
sentences.zh: 我们未来是否计划进一步削减？

sentences.en: We designed this change to create the organization we believe we need for our next chapter.
sentences.zh: 我们设计这一变革是为了创建我们认为下一章所需的组织。

sentences.en: We are not planning any further workforce reductions.
sentences.zh: 我们不打算进一步裁员。

blocks.html_en: • Is this reduction driven by AI improvements? No. While we are seeing significant value from AI internally, this decision was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI. We see internal AI adoption as an accelerator of our growth. This change was made to adapt the company to our new vision.

sentences.en: Is this reduction driven by AI improvements?
sentences.zh: 这种减少是由人工智能改进推动的吗？

sentences.en: No. While we are seeing significant value from AI internally, this decision was not made to reduce costs or replace people with AI.
sentences.zh: 不会。虽然我们在内部看到人工智能的巨大价值，但做出这一决定并不是为了降低成本或用人工智能取代人类。

sentences.en: We see internal AI adoption as an accelerator of our growth.
sentences.zh: 我们将内部人工智能的采用视为我们发展的加速器。

sentences.en: This change was made to adapt the company to our new vision.
sentences.zh: 做出这一改变是为了使公司适应我们的新愿景。

blocks.html_en: • Are people expected to work harder now that we have less people? Not harder - better. To give one example, we had many situations where work that could have been done in a few days took many months with multiple meetings and endless friction. This wasn't people's fault and everyone was frustrated by this. Our new org changes ownership to allow people to make decisions and move fast.

sentences.en: Are people expected to work harder now that we have less people?
sentences.zh: 既然我们人少了，人们是否会更加努力地工作？

sentences.en: Not harder - better.
sentences.zh: 不是更难——更好。

sentences.en: To give one example, we had many situations where work that could have been done in a few days took many months with multiple meetings and endless friction.
sentences.zh: 举个例子，我们遇到过很多情况，本来可以在几天内完成的工作却花了好几个月的时间，而且还需要多次会议和无休止的摩擦。

sentences.en: This wasn't people's fault and everyone was frustrated by this.
sentences.zh: 这不是人们的错，每个人都对此感到沮丧。

sentences.en: Our new org changes ownership to allow people to make decisions and move fast.
sentences.zh: 我们的新组织改变了所有权，让人们能够做出决策并快速行动。

blocks.html_en: • You're talking about the new AI products, what about our existing market and customers? We are lucky to have amazing customers that love our product and actually use these words to describe it. We need to be there for them with our new vision of doing the work with AI and not just managing it. They are also undergoing change and we will invest heavily to help them - they are our biggest asset.

sentences.en: You're talking about the new AI products, what about our existing market and customers?
sentences.zh: 你说的是新的人工智能产品，那我们现有的市场和客户呢？

sentences.en: We are lucky to have amazing customers that love our product and actually use these words to describe it.
sentences.zh: 我们很幸运，拥有热爱我们产品并实际使用这些词来描述它的出色客户。

sentences.en: We need to be there for them with our new vision of doing the work with AI and not just managing it.
sentences.zh: 我们需要以新的愿景为他们提供帮助，即利用人工智能开展工作，而不仅仅是管理人工智能。

sentences.en: They are also undergoing change and we will invest heavily to help them - they are our biggest asset.
sentences.zh: 他们也在经历变革，我们将大力投资来帮助他们——他们是我们最大的资产。

blocks.html_en: • Layoffs

sentences.en: Layoffs
sentences.zh: 裁员

blocks.html_en: • Software

sentences.en: Software
sentences.zh: 软件

content_html_zh:
作者：Henry Chandonnet 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

Monday.com 即将大幅削减。

根据其提交的 6-K 表格，这家企业软件公司计划裁员 20%。 披露称，此次裁员旨在使公司与其“人工智能工作平台的战略重点”保持一致。

Monday.com 加入了越来越多的公司在宣布裁员的同时引用人工智能的行列，例如 Snap 和 Block。 Monday.com 表示，它正在推行“人工智能驱动的增长战略”。

Monday.com 联合创始人兼联合首席执行官 Eran Zinman 在发给员工的信息中表示：“我们进入了一个新时代，人工智能正在改变软件的角色，为我们的行业创造了前所未有的最大机遇。”该信息发布在 LinkedIn 上。 “我们有一个新市场需要占领。 如果我们的运营方式不发生根本性的改变，我们将无法竞争并赢得这个市场。”

辛曼写道，这些变化意味着 Monday.com 正在变得更加扁平化，拥有更多的自主团队。

至于裁员是否是由人工智能改进推动的，联合首席执行官写道，这一决定“并不是为了降低成本或用人工智能取代人员”。

虽然 Monday.com 计划裁员 20%，但该公司还表示计划继续在重点领域进行招聘。

目前尚不清楚到底有多少工人将受到影响。 Monday.com 在 2025 年年度报告中表示，该公司拥有 3,155 名员工。 Monday.com 没有立即回应《商业内幕》的置评请求。

该公司的股价整个上午都在上涨，但此后又有所回落。 该股去年下跌约 75%。

Monday.com 为企业提供项目管理软件。 这一类别是日益增长的“SaaSpocalypse”担忧的目标。 投资者和分析师担心人工智能和氛围编码可能会削弱公司对这些工具的依赖。

阅读 Monday.com 联合首席执行官的完整备忘录：

大家好，在过去的九个月里，我们已经将我们的核心愿景从管理工作转向为客户工作，让人们和人工智能代理在一个工作空间中一起工作。这要求我们改变我们的产品、我们的战略以及我们为客户服务的方式。但很明显，改变我们的战略和产品是不够的。 我们为上一章建立的组织并不是适合新人工智能时代的组织。今天，我们宣布一项非常艰难的决定，将全球劳动力减少约 20%，影响约 620 人。这是我们自成立 monday.com 以来做出的最痛苦的决定 - 但我们确信这是正确的决定。 我们做到了。 我们拥有它。 我们对此承担全部责任。离开的人是才华横溢的同事和朋友。 他们帮助建立了这家公司，为我们的客户提供支持，并创造了一种让我们深感自豪的文化。 我们非常感谢他们，我们知道我们所说的任何话都无法减轻这对他们及其家人的影响。我们做出这一改变并不是为了保护我们所拥有的。 我们正在全力以赴地实现 monday.com 的目标。我们为什么要做出这一改变？我们进入了一个新时代，人工智能正在改变软件的角色，创造了我们行业有史以来最伟大的机会。我们有一个新的市场需要占领。 如果我们的运营方式不发生根本性的改变，我们将无法竞争并赢得这个市场。为了充分抓住这个机会，并确保 monday.com 在这一领域处于领先地位，我们需要更快地行动，更果断地执行，接受新的挑战，快速响应市场变化，并赋予公司员工创造更大的影响力。 周一我们将改变的一些事情：更扁平的组织——我们正在减少管理层，创建更强大的团队，并实现更快的决策。更自主的团队——我们正在从具有更多依赖性的团队转向拥有更广泛所有权和更大执行权力的更小团体。新的市场模式——我们的新产品正在打开一个新市场，而这个市场要求我们以不同的方式工作。 随着新客户和现有客户采用人工智能，他们越来越期望获得更深入的实施支持。 我们将与客户更密切地合作，增加我们的现场存在，创造新的角色，并调整许多现有的角色。提高利润并不是这个决定的目的。 我们打算将绝大多数储蓄再投资于我们的员工、我们的产品、人工智能和未来的增长。对于离开 monday.com 的人们，谢谢。 感谢您的辛勤工作，感谢您所产生的重大影响，感谢您对 monday.com 的如此深切的关心，感谢您始终愿意提供帮助和伸出援手。 我们知道这是我们文化的一部分，也是我们从每个在 monday.com 上与人们互动的人那里听到的。我们要明确的是：这一决定并不反映您的表现、贡献或价值。 这是管理层关于如何构建公司以迎接新篇章的决策的结果。我们致力于以关怀、尊重和有意义的帮助来支持您完成这一过渡。 我们将尽我们所能帮助您找到下一个机会，我们将为您提供慷慨的支持方案。对于正在招聘的公司：我们全心全意地推荐这些人。 他们是杰出的专业人士和队友，我们将帮助他们与寻找杰出人才的组织建立联系。对于留下来的人来说，参与如此重大的变革或看到同事和朋友如此迅速地离开并不容易。 我们了解这将是多么困难。 我们还应该让您清楚地了解这一变化的含义。这一变化并不是要求更少的人做同样数量的工作。 我们正在对我们将停止做的事情做出真正的选择。 我们将简化工作方式，消除不必要的摩擦，并赋予团队更多的决策权。从这次变革中走出来的公司将拥有更清晰的优先事项、更少的层级、更快的决策和更大的主人翁意识。我们对我们的未来充满信心，我们的道路也非常清晰。 这是我们选择做出的改变，我们对此承担全部责任。 在如此令人兴奋的技术的推动下，我们从未在软件领域看到过如此重要的机会。没有什么比看到新客户和现有客户对我们的新产品的反应以及我们的人工智能产品的采用加速更让我们更有信心了。每周，我们都会看到更多证据表明我们的战略是正确的。 客户正在接受我们的新愿景，我们的人工智能功能的采用不断加速，我们的信心不断增强。我们的势头强劲，我们相信我们正走在在巨大的市场机会上取得成功的正确道路上。为了缓解与此相关的不确定性，我们将在接下来的一小时内向所有员工发送一封电子邮件，然后由您的一位经理打来个人电话。对于所有经理来说，我们知道亲自处理这个问题有多么困难，即使您继续领导您的团队。 我们对您的领导能力充满信心，并且知道您会以谨慎、清晰和尊重的方式进行这些对话，这正是我们的文化。 感谢您在过渡期间为您的员工提供支持。谢谢 Roy 和 Eran 在变更过程中，我们收到了一些想要澄清的问题：我们进行此次削减的原因是为了提高利润率吗？ 不。提高利润并不是该决定的目的。 我们打算将绝大多数节省下来的资金再投资于我们的人才、产品、人工智能和未来的增长。我们未来是否计划进一步削减开支？ 我们设计这一变革是为了创建我们认为下一章所需的组织。 我们不打算进一步裁员。这种裁员是由人工智能改进推动的吗？ 不会。虽然我们在内部看到人工智能的巨大价值，但做出这一决定并不是为了降低成本或用人工智能取代人类。 我们将内部人工智能的采用视为我们发展的加速器。 做出这一改变是为了让公司适应我们的新愿景。现在我们的员工减少了，人们是否会更加努力地工作？ 不是更难——更好。 举个例子，我们遇到过很多情况，本来可以在几天内完成的工作却花了好几个月的时间，而且还需要多次会议和无休止的摩擦。 这不是人们的错，每个人都对此感到沮丧。 我们的新组织改变了所有权，让人们能够做出决策并快速行动。你谈论的是新的人工智能产品，那么我们现有的市场和客户呢？ 我们很幸运，拥有热爱我们产品并实际使用这些词来描述它的出色客户。 我们需要以新的愿景为他们提供帮助，即利用人工智能开展工作，而不仅仅是管理人工智能。 他们也在经历变革，我们将大力投资来帮助他们——他们是我们最大的资产。
